items.title: Jacobs to assist in planning of UK SMR projects
items.blurb: USA-based engineering group Jacobs has been selected by Great British Energy – Nuclear to provide planning and consenting services for the planned small modular reactor projects in the UK.

items.title: Terra Innovatum, Waiken ILW Will Deploy Microreactors for Data Center Infrastructure
items.blurb: A micro-modular nuclear reactor developer with global headquarters in Italy and a U.S. corporate office in Pennsylvania said it has been selected to deploy its equipment for data center infrastructure in Latin America…

items.title: ASP Isotopes Announces Quantum Leap Energy Research Agreement with Texas A&M Engineering Experiment Station to Advance Uranium Conversion Technology
items.blurb: Research Agreement Advances QLE's Effort to Develop Scalable Domestic Uranium Conversion Technology, a Critical U.S. Nuclear Fuel Supply Chain NeedDALLAS, July 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- ASP Isotopes Inc. (NASDAQ:…
